308 I5300_PRKNSN_CD I5300_PRKNSN_CD I5300 Active Diagnoses: Parkinsons Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of Parkinson's Disease in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
